name: Frontend Verification Loop
objective: After frontend route or i18n changes, verify browser screenshots, fix low-risk UI regressions, and stop when product or visual judgment is needed.

state_schema.status: pending, discovering, active, verifying, done, blocked, needs_human, budget_stopped
state_schema.objective_hash: Stable hash of objective and success criteria.
state_schema.items: Tracked work items with id, status, evidence, owner_role, verifier, and risk.
state_schema.attempts: Attempt log with role, action, changed evidence, verification result, and timestamp.
state_schema.failure_signatures: Repeated failure signatures and repeat counts.
state_schema.progress_metrics: Evidence that changed, passed, failed, or stayed unchanged.
state_schema.human_queue: Decisions, approvals, or missing context that require a human.
state_schema.next_cursor: Where the next run should resume.

success_criteria: Target routes render without blocking errors.
Desktop/mobile screenshots or snapshots confirm the main path.
Console and network checks show no blocking errors.
i18n/copy output shows no missing key, raw key, or unintended fallback locale.
reject_conditions: No new screenshot, console, network, or i18n evidence appears across two iterations.
The browser verifier or dev server is unavailable.
A product copy, translation tone, visual direction, route behavior, or scope-expansion decision is required.

continue_only_if: Next action stays inside approved scope.
A verifier can reject bad output.
New evidence changed or is likely from the next verifier.
Risk stays below the approval boundary.
The last cycle changed evidence, narrowed scope, reduced failures, or clarified the blocker.
Fewer than 3 item(s) are active in this cycle.
done_when: Target routes render without blocking errors.
Desktop/mobile screenshots or snapshots confirm the main path.
Console and network checks show no blocking errors.
i18n/copy output shows no missing key, raw key, or unintended fallback locale.
needs_human_when: translation tone or terminology decisions is required.
auth or data fixture changes is required.
blocked_when: No new screenshot, console, network, or i18n evidence appears across two iterations.
The browser verifier or dev server is unavailable.
A product copy, translation tone, visual direction, route behavior, or scope-expansion decision is required.
budget_stopped_when: More than 3 item(s) would be required in one cycle.
Token, time, cost, or tool budget is reached.

status_protocol.CONTINUE: Only when another cycle can increase verified certainty.
status_protocol.DONE: Success criteria passed with required pass evidence; return for acceptance.
status_protocol.NEEDS_HUMAN: Human judgment or explicit approval is required.
status_protocol.BLOCKED: Reliable progress is not possible with current evidence or verifier.
status_protocol.BUDGET_STOPPED: Item, iteration, time, token, or cost cap was reached.
